name: YCK SGBV Agent
description: Trauma-informed SGBV incident triage, referral matching, risk assessment, and FHIR-interoperable case management for youth protection in Kenya. Designed for counselors, volunteers, and program leads responding to gender-based violence.

extensions.description: FHIR context allowing the YCK SGBV agent to query a FHIR server for patient context and write SGBV observations, referrals, and consent resources securely.

scopes.name: patient/Observation.write
scopes.description: Write SGBV incident observations to EHR

scopes.name: patient/Patient.rs
scopes.description: Read patient demographics (minimal — YCK works anonymized)

skills.name: SGBV Incident Triage & Trauma-Informed Guidance
skills.description: Analyzes a reported SGBV incident (type, description, survivor demographics) and provides trauma-informed guidance to the responder. Outputs include: safety check suggestions, forensic preservation steps, appropriate follow-up questions, and immediate PFA (Psychological First Aid) recommendations.

inputs.name: incidentType
inputs.description: Type of incident (physical_abuse, sexual_abuse, emotional_abuse, neglect, bullying_harassment, domestic_violence, child_exploitation, missing_child, tech_enabled_abuse, other)

inputs.name: description
inputs.description: Free-text description of the incident (min 30 characters)

inputs.name: survivorGender
inputs.description: Gender of survivor (male, female, other, prefer_not_to_say)

skills.name: Referral Service Matching
skills.description: Matches an SGBV incident to verified local referral services across Kakamega and Vihiga counties. Considers incident type, location proximity, and service category (health, police, shelter, psychosocial, legal). Uses AI-powered semantic matching when available, falls back to keyword-based scoring. Returns ranked recommendations with relevance scores and reasoning.

skills.name: SGBV Risk Assessment
skills.description: Assesses the risk level and urgency of an SGBV incident. Returns a risk score (0-100), severity level (low/medium/high/critical), urgency (routine/urgent/emergency), contributing risk factors, and recommended actions. Uses AI-powered assessment when available, falls back to rule-based evaluation.

inputs.name: isEscalated
inputs.description: Whether the incident has been escalated

skills.name: FHIR Bundle Generation & Submission
skills.description: Generates a FHIR R4 transaction Bundle from an SGBV incident. Creates Observation (incident details with SNOMED CT coding), Patient (anonymized survivor), Consent (privacy consent), Location (service providers), and ServiceRequest (referrals) resources. Can optionally submit the bundle directly to a FHIR server using SHARP context credentials.

inputs.name: incident
inputs.description: Full incident object with all fields

inputs.name: matchedServiceIds
inputs.description: IDs of matched referral services to include as ServiceRequests

inputs.name: fhirToken
inputs.description: FHIR server access token (from SHARP context)

schemes.name: Prompt Opinion Workspace Auth
schemes.description: Authentication is handled by the Prompt Opinion platform. The agent receives FHIR context tokens from the workspace session.
